'''Donn Gulek''' was the [[Chief Historian]] at the [[Kellmer Institute of Galactic History]] as late as [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]]. He specialized in the history, development, and structure of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. A version of his article "[[Ten Years After: Notes on the Mature Organizational and Administrative Structure of the New Republic]]" was edited and annotated by [[Voren Na'al/Legends|Voren Na'al]] in cooperation with [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]], and was included in their dossier on the [[Black Fleet Crisis]].
